title: Clarke Cochrane draws top teams, players, coaches

title: 2024 Budget, Fee Schedule, and Sales Tax Updates
summary: The City of Cordova 2024 operating budget and fee schedule were passed on December 20th, 2023 by resolution numbers: 12-23-34 and 12-23-35.
